write the  brith day poem

Certainly! Here's a birthday poem for you:

Celebration of Life

Today we mark another year,
A page turned in life's precious sphere.
A journey 'round the sun complete,
A heart still dancing with upbeat.

With every laugh, with every tear,
You've painted memories so dear.
A canvas rich with love and fun,
A masterpiece that's just begun.

So blow the candles, make a wish,
Savor the joy, every moment's dish.
Surrounded by friends and love's embrace,
We celebrate you, and your life's grace.

May the year ahead unfold with charm,
With fewer worries, less alarm.
May it be kind, and may you find,
More happiness of every kind.

Happy Birthday! May it be,
Full of wonder, for you to see.
A year to cherish, to hold so tight,
In morning's dawn, and restful night.

So here's to you, on this your day,
May joy and love come to stay.
With every step, with every roam,
May laughter echo in your home.
write the brith day poem in odia

Of course, here's a simple birthday poem in Odia:

ଜନ୍ମଦିନ ଆସୁଛି ଆଜି,
ସୁଖ ମାଗଣା ହୋଉ ସମାଜି।
ମୋର ସ୍ନେହମୟୀ, ହାସି ମୁଖୀ ତୁମେ,
ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନରେ ଅନୁଭବ କର ଖୁସି ଅନୁମେ।

ଦୀପ ଜଳାଇ ଆଶା ରଖ,
ସବୁ ଦୁଖ ବିପତ୍ତି ପାଖରୁ ପାର ରହ।
ସବୁଦିନ ଆନନ୍ଦ, ସବୁ ରାତି ଭଲ,
ସିନ୍ଧୁବେଳାର ଇତି ଛିଁ ଆତି ସହଜ।

ତୁମ ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନଟି ହେଉ ମଧୁମୟ,
ସିଁହାସର ଉଲ୍ଲାସ ହାତେରେ ନିୟ।
ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନର ହାର୍ଦିକ ଅଭିନନ୍ଦନ,
ସଫଳତା ନେଇ ଆସୁ ପ୍ରତିକ୍ଷଣ।

Please note that the exact expressions and nuances may vary with natural Odia poetry, and this is a simple attempt to provide a birthday-themed verse. If this poem is intended for use in a traditional setting, or if you have specific sentiments or themes you’d like to convey, you can always reach out to an Odia poet or native speaker for a more tailored and culturally authentic piece.

The song "Teri Mitti" is from the Bollywood movie "Kesari" (2019). It's a patriotic song that pays homage to the soldiers of the Indian Army. The song was sung by B Praak, and the music was composed by Arko, while the heartfelt lyrics were penned by Manoj Muntashir. Below are the full lyrics of the song:

```
Talvaron pe sar waar diye
Angaaron mein jism jalaya hai

Jo tere liye sau dard sahe

Ai meri zameen, mehboob meri
Meri nas-nas mein tera ishq bahe
Pheeka na pade kabhi rang tera
Jismon se nikal ke khoon kahe

Teri mitti mein mil jaawaan
Gul banke main khil jaawaan
Ittni si hai dil ki aarzu
Teri nadiyon mein beh jaawaan
Teri kheton mein lehrawaan
Ittni si hai dil ki aarzu

Sarson se bhare khalihaan mere
Jahan jhoom ke bhangda paawaan
Vehdeyaan de chhawein jhulasaawaa
Othe amla de honay ne nabere

Kasumbi rangon ko sookha ke
Gudwaan di laraiyaan laawaan
Surma aape gola bharke
Othe kheton mein failawaan

Teri mitti mein mil jaawaan
Gul banke main khil jaawaan
Itni si hai dil ki arzoo
Teri nadiyon mein beh jaawaan
Teri kheton mein lehrawaan
Itni si hai dil ki arzoo

O heer meri tu hansti rahe
Teri aankh ghadi bhar nam na ho
Main marta tha jis mukhde pe
Kabhi uska ujala kam na ho

O maai meri koi manzil ho
Gawaara nahi hai
Tere bina meri koi manzil
Manzil nahi hai

Tere bina meri koi manzil
Manzil nahi hai

Teri mitti mein mil jaawaan
Gul banke main khil jaawaan
Itni si hai dil ki arzoo
Teri nadiyon mein beh jaawaan
Teri kheton mein lehrawaan
Itni si hai dil ki arzoo
Ittni si hai dil ki arzoo

give me mother mery,s song in english

It seems you are asking for the lyrics of "Ave Maria," which is one of the most popular hymns honoring the Virgin Mary in the Christian tradition. The version composed by Franz Schubert, often sung with Latin lyrics, is also frequently adapted with various lyrics in different languages, including English. Below is a commonly used English version of the Schubert "Ave Maria":

Ave Maria, maiden mild!
Listen to a maiden's prayer!
Thou canst hear though from the wild;
Thou canst save amid despair.
Safe may we sleep beneath thy care,
Though banish'd, outcast and reviled –
Maiden! hear a maiden's prayer;
Mother, hear a suppliant child!

Ave Maria!

Ave Maria! undefiled!
The flinty couch we now must share
Shall seem with down of eider piled,
If thy protection hover there.
The murky cavern's heavy air
Shall breathe of balm if thou hast smiled;
Then, maiden! hear a maiden's prayer;
Mother, list a suppliant child!

Ave Maria!

Ave Maria! stainless styled.
Foul demons of the earth and air,
From this their wonted haunt exiled,
Shall flee before thy presence fair.
We bow us to our lot of care,
Beneath thy guidance reconciled;
Hear for a maid a maiden's prayer,
And for a father hear a child!

Ave Maria!

Please note that the English lyrics provided here are not a direct translation of the original Latin text but rather an adaptation. The English version can vary greatly in different performances and arrangements. If you are referring to a different "Mother Mary's song," please provide additional context or lyrics, and I will do my best to assist you.

It seems like you might be referring to the song "Go Tell It on the Mountain," which is a traditional African-American spiritual that dates back to at least 1865. It has been sung by church choirs and recorded by many artists in various styles over the years. The song celebrates the Nativity of Jesus and is particularly popular during the Christmas season.

Here is one common version of the full lyrics:

```Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.

While shepherds kept their watching
O'er silent flocks by night,
Behold, throughout the heavens
There shone a holy light.

Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.

The shepherds feared and trembled
When lo! above the earth
Rang out the angel chorus
That hailed our Savior's birth.

Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.

Down in a lowly manger
The humble Christ was born;
And God sent us salvation
That blessed Christmas morn.

Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.

When I am a seeker,
I seek both night and day;
I seek the Lord to help me,
And He shows me the way.

Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.

He made me a watchman
Upon the city wall,
And if I am a Christian,
I am the least of all.

Go tell it on the mountain,
Over the hills and everywhere;
Go tell it on the mountain
That Jesus Christ is born.```

Again, the lyrics can vary in different versions and arrangements. Please note that this song is in the public domain, which is why the full lyrics can be provided here. If you were referring to a different song with a title similar to "go up to the mountain," please provide additional information for more accurate assistance.
brith day song in english

The most traditional and widely recognized birthday song in English is "Happy Birthday to You," which is commonly sung to celebrate the anniversary of a person's birth. Here are the lyrics:

```
Happy Birthday to You,
Happy Birthday to You,
Happy Birthday Dear (name),
Happy Birthday to You.
```

From there, the song can have additional verses or be followed by various chants, such as:

```
From good friends and true,
From old friends and new,
May good luck go with you,
And happiness too.
```

This simple but heartfelt song is often accompanied by clapping, and it concludes with the birthday person making a wish and blowing out the candles on their birthday cake. "Happy Birthday to You" is frequently used in English-speaking countries and has been translated into many languages worldwide, making it one of the most globally recognized songs.

give me poem abaut  celebriting sisters  brithday

Certainly! Here's a custom poem to celebrate a sister's birthday:

**Celebration of Sister's Day**

In the dance of life, there's a special day,
For the sister I cherish, in every way.
Today's the day we celebrate your birth,
And all the joy you bring to this Earth.

From childhood giggles to grown-up dreams,
Together we've sailed life's infinite streams.
Ties that bind us beyond bloodlines,
Sister, in you, my heart entwines.

With every candle on your cake,
A wish for happiness, I hope to make.
For love and laughter to be your guide,
And endless joy to fill your stride.

We've shared secrets, clothes, and far-off looks,
We've read together countless storybooks.
Your wisdom and warmth, a guiding light,
Through every challenge, every plight.

So here's to you on this fine day,
May it be magical in every way.
Balloons and confetti, up in the air,
Singing the anthem of our sisterly care.

A toast to the days that have yet to come,
To the harmonious melodies we've yet to hum.
For my sister, my friend, my confidant too,
A very Happy Birthday, I wish for you!

Yes, here's to you, and all you embody,
Let’s cut the cake and start the party!
Because, dearest sister, one thing is clear,
Your birthday's a highlight of my year.

Certainly! Here's a birthday poem for your sister in Odia:

ପ୍ରିୟା ବୋନେ,
ତୁମର ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନରେ
ମୋର ଅନେକ ଶୁଭ କାମନା।
ତୁମର ସବୁ ସ୍ୱପ୍ନ ପୂରଣ ହୋଉ,
ତୁମର ଜୀବନରେ ସୁଖ ମୟ ହୋଉ।

ବାଳ୍ୟ କାଳ ସେ ଏବେ ଯାଉଁଛି ଗଲେ,
ଭାଇ ଭଉଣୀ ମିଳି ସାଥେ, ଅନେକ ସ୍ଵପ୍ନ ରଚିଛୁ ପାଳେ।
ଆଜି ତୁମର ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନ, ମିଳି କେକ କାଟିବା,
ତୁମକୁ ଆଲିଂଗନ ଦେବା, ଏଇ ଆନନ୍ଦର ଯାତ୍ରାର ସାଥେ ଯାଇବା।

ତୁମକୁ ଶୁଭେଚ୍ଛା ଦେବା ହେଉ ଖୁସିର କାରଣ,
ଭଗବାନ୍ ଦେଉଁଥାଉ ତୁମ ପାଇଁ ବିପଦରୁ ମୋକ୍ଷ କାରଣ।
ସବୁ ଭଲ ବିଷୟ ଆସି ଯାଉ, ସୁଖ ସନ୍ତୋଷ ରହଉ,
ଆଜି ତୁମର ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନ ହୋଉ, ଉତ୍ସବ ମୟ।

ଜନ୍ମ ଦିନ ଆସିଛି ଆଜି ତୁମର,
ଆଜି ମୋତେ ମିଳି ଖୁସିର ପରିବାର।
ଭଗବାନ୍ ରଖନ୍ତୁ ତୁମକୁ ଖୁସିରେ,
ଜନ୍ମଦିନର ଅନେକ ଶୁଭେଚ୍ଛା ମୋରେ।

odia song

Certainly! Odia songs are an integral part of the culture in Odisha, India, and they come in various genres, from devotional to romantic to folk. One of the most popular types of Odia music is the "Odia Bhajan," which are devotional songs dedicated to the deities worshipped in Odisha.

Here's a snippet of an Odia Bhajan paying homage to Lord Jagannath:

ମିଛା ମାଇଁ ପାରେ ନା,
ଜଗନ୍ନାଥଙ୍କ ନାଁ ସୁନା,
ଉତା ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଦ୍ୱାର, 
ଚାଲି ଯାଉ ପୁରୀ ବାର।।

(Transliteration)
Michha main pare na,
Jagannatha nka naam suna,
Utha mangala dwaara,
Chali jaau Puri baara.

(Translation)
I cannot deny,
Hearing the name of Lord Jagannath,
Get up and move towards the auspicious door,
Let's go to the abode in Puri.

Please keep in mind that translations might not convey the exact feeling and intricacies of the original lyrics due to cultural and linguistic nuances, and Odia songs are often steeped in regional culture, heritage, and devotion.

If you're looking for a specific Odia song or a different type of Odia music, feel free to provide more details, and I will do my best to share relevant information or lyrics.
movie song in hindi

Hindi cinema, also known as Bollywood, has a rich history and tradition of songs that form an integral part of its movies. These songs span a wide range of genres and themes, from love ballads to dance numbers.

Here's a popular Hindi movie song from the film "Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge" (1995), which is one of the most iconic films in Indian cinema. The song is titled "Tujhe Dekha Toh Yeh Jaana Sanam":

तुझे देखा तो ये जाना सनम
प्यार होता है दीवाना सनम
अब यहाँ से कहाँ जाएँ हम
तेरी बाहों में मर जाएँ हम

(Transliteration)
Tujhe dekha to yeh jaana sanam
Pyaar hota hai deewana sanam
Ab yahaan se kahaan jaayein hum
Teri baahon mein mar jaayein hum

(Translation)
Since I've seen you, my beloved, I've realized
That love is crazy, my beloved
Now where do we go from here
I could die in your arms

This song is beautifully sung by Kumar Sanu and Lata Mangeshkar, and the music is composed by Jatin-Lalit, with lyrics penned by Anand Bakshi.

If you are looking for a different Hindi movie song, please provide more details such as the movie's name, the song's name, or the actors involved, and I will be happy to help you with the lyrics or information about that song.
sadak movie full song

The movie "Sadak" is a Bollywood film released in 1991, directed by Mahesh Bhatt. It featured several songs that were very popular and are still remembered fondly. The music was composed by Nadeem-Shravan, and the songs were an important part of the film's success. Below, I'll list the songs from the movie "Sadak" and provide the full lyrics to one of the most famous tracks, "Tumhein Apna Banane Ki Kasam."

Here's the list of songs from "Sadak":

1. Tumhein Apna Banane Ki Kasam
2. Zamane Ke Dekhein Hain Rang Hazar
3. Jab Jab Pyar Pe Pehra Hua Hai
4. Rehne Ko Ghar Nahin
5. Hum Tere Bin Kahin Reh Nahin Paate
6. Mohabbat Ki Hai
7. Tak Dhin Dhin Tak

मेरी ज़िंदगी में सिर्फ तुम्हारा प्यार अगर आएगी

तुम्हें अपना बनाने की कसम...

तेरी बाहों में मिल जाएँ जो मिल जाएँ
तू संग दिल ये मेरा जो मिल जाएँ
अगर हर राहत गंगा ने भर जाएँ
बहत तेरी मोहोब्बत में जो मिल जाएँ
तेरी चाहत में चाहत ही नज़र आएगी
तुम्हें देखने के बाद...

(There is more to the song, but this gives you a feel for the lyrics.)

The songs were sung by legendary singers like Anuradha Paudwal, Kumar Sanu, Manhar Udhas, Abhijeet, and Babla Mehta.
